title: D2 encryption-frame binary-layout spec
description: Schema for contracts/encryption-frame/encryption-frame.spec.json — the source-of-truth catalog of binary-layout field positions + byte lengths for the D2 on-wire encryption frame ([version:1][kid_len:1][kid:UTF-8 N][nonce:12][ct+tag:M]). DcsvIo.D2.EncryptionFrame.SourceGen reads it to emit field-offset / byte-length constants into DcsvIo.D2.Encryption; the TypeScript codegen pipeline reads it to emit encryption-frame.g.ts into @dcsv-io/d2-encryption-abstractions. The .NET encoder and any TS reader of @dcsv-io/d2-encryption-abstractions reference the same catalog so the binary layout cannot drift across language boundaries.

version.description: Current frame format version. Encoders embed this value into the VERSION field; decoders MUST reject any other value via FrameVersionMismatchException.

constName.description: Public C# / TS constant identifier — UPPER_SNAKE_CASE. Must be unique across the spec.

offset.description: Byte offset from frame start. -1 indicates a variable offset (computed from preceding variable-length fields).

length.description: Byte length. -1 indicates a variable length (consumes remainder or is declared by another field).

kind.description: How the decoder reads this field. byte_fixed = fixed-size byte span at a fixed offset; variable_utf8 = UTF-8 string at a fixed offset with variable length declared elsewhere; variable_remainder = consumes remainder of frame from offset; byte_fixed_trailing = fixed-size byte span at the END of the frame (parsed from the trailing edge).

doc.description: XML <summary> / JSDoc text rendered on the emitted constant.

deprecated.description: When true, the entry is deprecated: the generated C# constant + factory carry [Obsolete] and the TS constant + factory carry @deprecated. Additive — the entry is NEVER deleted. Deleting a deprecated (or non-deprecated) entry is a breaking change the JSON-diff gate fails.

deprecatedReason.description: Plain dev-facing English explaining why the code is deprecated; rendered into the [Obsolete("...")] message, the @deprecated JSDoc, and the changelog entry. NOT a TK key (developer-facing, not user-facing).

replacedBy.description: Wire code of the successor entry (e.g. RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND). Must reference a real, non-deprecated entry in the merged registry. Omit for pure retirement with no replacement.

sunset.description: ISO-8601 date for the future RFC 8594 Sunset response header. Edge-runtime-deferred: carried on the contract now, consumed by the Edge response middleware when it exists. Inert until then.
